hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bun run check && bun run typecheck; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then bun run check && bun run typecheck; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh api|gh pr|gh issue|gh run'; then echo '⚠ GitHub API 호출 감지. 로컬에서 가능한 작업인지 먼저 확인하세요. rate limit 낭비 주의.'; fi

hooks.prompt:
End-of-turn quality gate. Check changed files for violations.

STEP 1: Run `git status --porcelain` to identify changed files.
Categorize: UI (.astro/.tsx/.jsx/.css), API (.ts in routes/api/server), Config (wrangler/tsconfig/biome).

STEP 2: Per category, grep changed files for:
- UI: hardcoded colors (#hex, rgb(, hsl( outside var()), hardcoded spacing (raw px not var(--space-*)), animation without prefers-reduced-motion, animate on width/height/top/left
- API/TS: @ts-ignore, biome-ignore, eslint-disable, as any, hardcoded secrets
- Astro: client:load on non-interactive components, missing lang on <html>

STEP 3: Check AND UPDATE memory/pattern-history.md:
- If violations found: read the table. If the violation pattern already exists, increment count and update date. If new, append a row: | violation description | 1 | today's date | TRACKING |.
- If any pattern reaches count 3, change its status to ESCALATE.
- If no violations found: read only, do not modify.

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
If no violations: {"ok": true}
If violations found: {"ok": false, "reason": "## Quality Gate: FAIL\n- [severity] file:line — description"}

Check if architecture/design decisions were made in this turn. If yes, append to memory/decisions-log.md with format:

## [date] [title]
- 결정: ...
- 근거: ...
- 대안: ...
- 선택 이유: ...

RESPONSE FORMAT: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text.
If no decisions were made: {"ok": true}
If decisions were logged: {"ok": true}
